environmentConstraint: Worktree-only, no running database and no running Next.js app instance; no-deploy. Composable logic, read-models, aggregation, governance, mappers, and guards are built + proven deterministically. The two capabilities that require a live environment (new Prisma models + a migrated database for the spine's canonical persistence round-trip, and a rendered Next.js Decision Centre page) cannot be proven here and are named as exact remaining dependencies.

opportunities.title: canonical interaction spine
opportunities.proof: 12 tests incl compounding v1→v2→v3, tenant/case isolation, correction, deletion

opportunities.title: canonical store (resolve memory duplication)
opportunities.proof: spine is canonical; architecture guard forbids runtime import of deprecated file store; remaining: bind spine store to Prisma models (needs DB)

opportunities.title: tenant + consent isolation
opportunities.proof: cross-tenant/case denial, consent fail-closed, tombstone replay block

opportunities.title: durable propagation outbox
opportunities.proof: 8 proofs: propagation, failure isolation, retry, replay-no-dup, dead-letter, tenant reject, deleted-not-reconstituted

opportunities.title: playbook wiring (logic)
opportunities.proof: real engine→mapper→spine→twin integration across two products; remaining: live playbook API DB persistence edge (needs DB)

opportunities.title: product→interaction mapper registry
opportunities.proof: typed mapping preserved, unmapped fails closed; playbook+reporting mappers

opportunities.title: strategy room orchestration
opportunities.proof: mapper pattern established; needs live intake path + orchestrator convergence (OPP-19) + DB persistence

opportunities.title: retainer cycle memory → twin
opportunities.proof: reporting/cycle mapper pattern applies; twin compounding proven; remaining: bind retainer service runtime (needs DB)

opportunities.title: monthly reporting longitudinal
opportunities.proof: reportingCycleMapper maps cycle deltas into twin; longitudinal compounding proven via spine

opportunities.title: custom reporting scope-version memory
opportunities.proof: spine correction/versioning preserves superseded v1 + current v2 (history not rewritten)

opportunities.title: cross-moat brief (GMI × twin)
opportunities.proof: exposure-only, DRAFT-Q2 refused, hash-bound stale detection, uncertainty from gaps

opportunities.title: decision-integrity trend
opportunities.proof: process-only, evidence-backed, null-not-fake, irrelevant change isolated

opportunities.title: governed next-admissible-move
opportunities.proof: state-derived, evidence→gather-not-upsell, controlled/retired/completed handled, explainable, not revenue-maxing

opportunities.title: Decision Centre twin read model
opportunities.proof: customer-visible view + ownership gate + provenance; remaining: rendered Next.js page (needs app)

opportunities.title: outcome + checkpoint loop
opportunities.proof: evidence classes; high-stakes cannot close on weak proxy; feeds integrity

opportunities.title: enterprise portfolio intelligence
opportunities.proof: RBAC, no-cross-client, aggregation threshold, deletion-aware clusters

opportunities.title: calendar/behavioural signals
opportunities.dependency: customer consent record + an external calendar connector (OAuth/ingest) that does not exist in the estate; safe signal schema defined in ledger; no implementation assumed

opportunities.title: bounded simulation/counterfactual
opportunities.dependency: strategic-twin-simulation-engine is BUILT_BUT_UNWIRED; requires a runtime perf benchmark (input size/exec time/memory) before safe synchronous or async activation; not a guessed slowness

opportunities.title: converge orchestrator duplication
opportunities.proof: spine is single canonical record/propagate path; diagnostics keep their orchestrator; guard prevents deprecated-store use; converge decision deferred to Decision Centre UI wiring

opportunities.title: resolve living-intelligence duplication
opportunities.proof: both assemblers dormant; Decision Centre read model (OPP-14) is the canonical surface; converge onto it when the page is wired

opportunities.title: retire obsolete GMI seed modules
opportunities.proof: architecture guard + census: superseded by gmi-data-service; no runtime caller; no-new-use enforced

opportunities.title: resolve decision-centre adapter duplication
opportunities.proof: canonical read model is decision-centre-intelligence.ts (OPP-14); legacy adapters converge when the page is wired

opportunities.title: product-knowledge-graph as next-move input
opportunities.proof: next-move engine accepts candidate products (graph-shaped) via injected CandidateProduct list; runtime binds the graph

opportunities.title: data export/correction/deletion/retention
opportunities.proof: tenant-scoped export; correction=versioning (spine); deletion removes + tombstones; no lock-in

opportunities.title: observability for the pipeline
opportunities.proof: outbox exposes processingState/attempts/dead-letter/correlation+causation; operator-visible dead-letter store; remaining: admin UI surface (needs app)

genuinelyRemainingNeedsLiveEnvironment: Bind the spine's canonical InteractionStore to NEW Prisma models (Interaction, StrategicTwinState, CaseTenantBinding, Outbox) + a migrated database, to prove the persisted round-trip (interaction→persisted memory→persisted twin version). Requires a running database.
Render the Decision Centre twin-snapshot Next.js page over buildTwinSnapshotView + the admin observability surface over the outbox. Requires a running Next.js app instance to prove render + auth.
